title: Football Among Us
description: Football among us Shoot is an one-button Physics based soccer game! It is easy to play and very entertaining, will bring you a huge fun when play with friends. Support multiplayer match, create your own avatar and build your dream team! Control your team by tapping the button to poke your opponent, kick & shoot the ball into your opponent’s gate! Easy to play, but not that easy to score! Go to win your friends and to be the hero in their hearts! LOL If you like football and soccer, you must play this humorous game NOW!
